chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7132 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.31106/2021 2. For hearing of main case 10.12.2024 Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Rabia Khalid, Assistant Attorney General The present controversy is with respect to classification of goods and per the judgment of the Supreme Court dated 18.01.2024 passed in Civil Appeal Nos.799 to 824 of 2015 (Additional Collector of Customs, Model Customs Collectorate of Appraisement (West) vs. K.S. Sulemanji Esmailji and Sons Pvt. Ltd. Karachi) and subsequent Division Bench judgment dated 26.09.2024, of this Court in the case of Collector of Customs vs. Dua International and Co. (SCRA 1490 of 2023), the matter ought to be determined by the Classification Committee. Respective learned counsel jointly state that the matter shall be referred to the Classification Committee by the respondent-department and pending decision of the Classification Committee the security placed before it shall not be en-cashed. It is jointly submitted that the petition be disposed off as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
